content: We can frame the iterative output improvement process of LLM Self-Refine as a real-time implementation of the Reflexion agent’s dynamic long-term self-reflection memory mechanism, turning one-shot abstract self-reflection into a stepwise, goal-aligned refinement loop that accumulates incremental improvements into tangible output quality gains. This structure mirrors how human learners combine periodic big-picture reflection on personal performance with small iterative tweaks to specific outputs to build consistent skill growth.
